allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=15 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new hexa 'echo CONNECTED; uname -a; cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null | head -3; echo "---"; nproc; free -h | head -2; echo "---PORTS---"; ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E ":80 |:443 " || echo "80/443 free"; echo "---DOCKER---"; docker --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no docker"; echo "---CADDY---"; which caddy nginx 2>/dev/null || echo "no caddy/nginx"')
